name: Missed a week work after ladder fall in Saint George—how calculate lost pay?
description: 2/3 wages via stubs; full in suits.[4][5]

mainEntity.name: Missed a week work after ladder fall in Saint George—how calculate lost pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2/3 wages via stubs; full in suits.[4][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Total wages lost + benefits via paystubs, tax returns.** Utah comp pays ~2/3 wages.[4] Key factors: (1) Include overtime; (2) future losses if disabled; (3) third-party full wage; (4) doctor excuses.[5] Submit employer verification, project totals, lawyer audits. Accurate calc prevents underpayment.
